content.full_text:
July 23, 1992

Mr. Scott Hallabrin, Esq.
Acting General Counsel
Legal Division
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

I am requesting your assistance on questions that have been raised during my campaign as a candidate for County Supervisor in Sutter County. I spoke on the telephone with Mr. John Wallace on July 21, 1992 and he suggested that I write my request addressed to you.

I am a member of the Board of Directors of the Fremont-Rideout Health Group. The Fremont-Rideout Health Group is a California Nonprofit Public Benefit Corporation that owns and operates two hospitals, Fremont Medical Center and Rideout Memorial Hospital. I am, also, a member of the Board of Directors of the two hospitals.

I receive as a benefit, the payment of my health insurance premium in the amount of $2,883.00 a year.

At the present time there is litigation pending wherein Fremont Medical Center and Rideout Memorial Hospital are suing The County of Sutter, The Board of Supervisors of the County of Sutter, and the individual members thereof for Breach of Contract.

Fremont and Rideout Hospitals complain that they have provided hospital and medical care to persons whose care was not paid for by Federal or State assistance, or any other source, and who were indigent and residents of Sutter County pursuant to contracts between Rideout and Fremont Hospitals and Sutter County that authorized such services by the hospitals for payment by Sutter County. Sutter County refuses to pay for the services rendered by the hospitals.

Mr. Scott Hallabrin, Esq.
July 23, 1992
Page Two

I have enclosed a copy of the Complaint for your further information and clarification.

QUESTION 1: In the event that I am elected Sutter County Supervisor and this litigation is still pending, do I have a conflict of interest due to my membership on the Hospitals' Board of Directors?

QUESTION 2: If the answer to Question 1 is Yes, what are my options to avoid the conflict of interest?

I appreciate your assistance in this matter. If you have any questions that I can answer by telephone, my number is (916) 673-0223. I will be out of town until August 2, 1992.

Thank you for your attention and time.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
JOAN BECHTEL
813 Sanborn Road
Yuba City, CA 95993
